notes: Solid breakout implementation with proper physics, angle-based paddle bouncing, speed increase, and audio; minor issues include no brick outlines/highlights for retro feel and the ball starts invisible on the START screen since it's positioned at paddle but state never shows it.

An exceptionally well-crafted Breakout clone with perfect classic colors, robust state management, and synthesized audio; the only minor flaw is an aggressive 2% speed increase per brick that can lead to ball tunneling in the very late game.
Core Breakout gameplay is solid and complete, but mouse control is unintentionally enabled, collision/ball-speed handling is a bit rough, and the presentation is competent rather than polished.
